name: edit_file
description: Perform exact string replacement in a file. Supports single or bulk replacement, optional checksum verification for concurrency safety, and dry-run preview. Use for modifying existing files, patching code, or updating configuration values.

file_path.description: Path to the file to edit. Must be within allowed write directories.

old_string.description: Exact string to find and replace. Must exist in the file.

new_string.description: Replacement string. Must differ from old_string.

replace_all.description: If true, replace all occurrences. If false, require exactly one occurrence. Defaults to false.

checksum.description: md5 checksum from a prior read. If non-empty, edit is rejected when the file has changed. Pass empty string to skip check.

dry_run.description: If true, return a diff preview without writing changes. Defaults to false.
